title: Terms and Conditions
intro: These terms apply to all commissions and songs created by me. By requesting a commission, you automatically agree to these conditions.

sections.title: Commission Process
content: The client contacts me with a clear idea of the request.
The project’s viability is reviewed.
Payment is made through Ko-fi.
Work begins once payment is confirmed.
The final product is delivered within the agreed timeframe (may be extended if necessary).

sections.title: Payments
content: All payments are made upfront.
Payments are handled through Ko-fi.
No work begins without confirmed payment.

sections.title: Client Responsibility
content: The client must provide clear information and necessary references before work begins.
Delays in client responses may affect delivery time.
If the client does not respond for 14 days, the commission may be considered paused. If 30 days pass without response, it will be considered abandoned without refund.

sections.title: Revisions
content: Revisions included depend on the selected plan.
Additional revisions may require an extra fee.
Major changes after approving a sketch or demo are not included.

sections.title: Usage & Credit
content: The client may use the work as agreed.
Visible credit is always required (optional if full rights were purchased).
Reselling or claiming authorship of the work is not permitted unless full rights were purchased.
As the creator, I retain full freedom to distribute the work on music platforms unless full rights were purchased.
The work may be displayed in my portfolio unless otherwise agreed.
The client is responsible for any legal issues related to the use of the work.
If full rights are purchased, the client is responsible for properly registering the work on platforms.

sections.title: Cancellations & Refunds
content: No refunds once work has started.
If the client cancels before work begins, a partial refund may be discussed.
If I am unable to complete the work, a full refund will be issued.

sections.title: Delivery & Files
content: Final files are delivered once the client approves the final work.
High-quality final files are delivered only after full payment.
Delivery is provided in an organized .zip file.
File backup is not guaranteed after 30 days.
Editable files (.flp, project files, raw MIDI) are not included unless previously agreed.
Usage rights are delivered along with the final files according to the selected plan.
Modifications requested after final delivery may require a new quote.

sections.title: Full Rights Transfer (Buyout)
content: If full rights are purchased, the client obtains complete control over the exploitation, modification, and distribution of the work.
The client may use the work without crediting the original creator.
The original author may not resell or commercially reuse the work.
This transfer does not include moral rights unless a separate legal agreement is made.

notes.title: Client Response Time
notes.content: If the client does not respond within 14 days during the process, the commission may be paused. If 30 days pass without response, it will be considered abandoned without refund.

notes.title: Request Rejection
notes.content: I reserve the right to decline any request that does not align with my values or that I am unable to fulfill for any reason. This includes, but is not limited to, illegal, offensive, or hateful content.

notes.title: Deadline Extensions
notes.content: Delivery time may vary due to workload, emergencies, or unforeseen complications. If an extension is needed, the client will be informed as soon as possible.

notes.title: Copyright & Distribution
notes.content: As the creator, I retain the right to showcase the work in my portfolio and social media unless otherwise agreed. I may also distribute the work on music platforms if full rights were not purchased. The client is responsible for properly registering the work if full rights are acquired.

notes.title: Revisions & Changes
notes.content: Included revisions are intended for minor and medium adjustments. Major changes after approving a sketch or demo are not included and may require a new quote.

notes.title: Confidentiality
notes.content: I will not share details of your project with third parties without your consent, unless necessary to complete the commission (for example, hiring additional musicians).

items.a: It depends on the type of commission and my current workload. The estimated timeframe listed in each plan is usually respected, but it may vary or be extended if necessary.

items.q: Can I request changes after delivery?
items.a: Minor adjustments may be possible within a reasonable timeframe. Major changes or extensive revisions after delivery are not included and may require a new quote.
Only in early stages. Major changes later in the process may require an additional fee.

items.q: Can I use the work without giving credit?
items.a: Yes, if you purchased full rights. Otherwise, visible credit is required.

items.q: What if I don't like the final result?
items.a: Revisions are included to adjust the work. After all included revisions are used, refunds are not provided.

items.q: If I don’t have a clear idea, can you help me define it?
items.a: Of course! I’m here to help shape your idea. We can discuss your needs and preferences to find the best option.

items.q: Can I request a custom commission not listed in the plans?
items.a: Yes. If you have a specific idea that doesn’t fit the standard plans, contact me and we can discuss a custom commission.

items.q: What payment methods do you accept?
items.a: All payments are handled through Ko-fi, which supports multiple payment methods such as credit cards and PayPal.

items.q: Which plan should I choose for a Friday Night Funkin’ project?
items.a: For a standard song (with character vocals), choose the "Song / OST" plan. For menu themes or derivative tracks, the "Background Music (BGM)" plan may be sufficient depending on the project’s needs.

items.q: What kind of music can you create?
items.a: I can produce various styles, from electronic to orchestral. If you have a specific genre in mind, feel free to ask and I’ll share examples if available.

items.q: Can I commission music for something other than a game?
items.a: Absolutely! While I have experience with game music, I can also create music for videos, podcasts, or any other type of project.

items.q: Can I request a remix or cover of an existing song?
items.a: Yes, I can work on remixes or covers. However, they must be for personal use or of your own project. I will not work with third-party songs without proper permission.

items.q: In the "Song / OST" plan, what does "10+ days" mean?
items.a: It represents the estimated delivery time. It may vary depending on the project’s complexity and my current workload, and in some cases may extend beyond 10 days.

cta.title: Ready to Commission?
cta.description: Have questions or ready to start your project? Feel free to contact me!
